title: onychium viviparum
intro: Onychium viviparum, also known as the viviparous onychium or living fern, is a type of fern that reproduces by producing small offsets or "babies" on its leaves, which eventually grow into new plants. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of onychium viviparum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
